predicate.title: Roadmap legibility: what's-next entry point and honest statuses
predicate.problem: The roadmap could not answer 'what's next?': delivered priorities still read status active, slices carried no status at all, two numbering systems (owner-directive priorities vs design-time slices) had no stated relationship, and the current highest priority (granular token usage) was absent from the generated roadmap doc — a lower-tier model reading the roadmap had no mechanical way to find the single current priority.
acceptance_criteria: A single entry-point node (roadmap-whats-next) names the current NOW item in its first line and states the priority-vs-slice reading rules and a maintenance rule for promotion
Every roadmap-item node carries an honest status: done for delivered priorities 0-2 and slice 1, active for open items
docs/design/roadmap.md is regenerated with the what's-next section first and priority 3 included; scaffold --check and check.py pass
